links.context: This condemnation involves body and soul (see [[JOH.5:29]]). Only Lord God is better
will be raised to eternal judgment ([[JOH.5:28]], [[JOH.5:29]]).

Father? Well then, He truly rose, and after He had risen was seen again of the disciples . . . are you still incredulous in regard to His Resurrection?" (See also [[JOH.5:25]], [[JOH.5:28]], [[JOH.5:29]].)
for those who have done good and condemnation for those who have done evil ([[JOH.5:29]]).
